details: Fully integrated in MRV; emission factors derived from 736 datapoints across 249 sites (Sasmito et al. 2023): aquaculture 579 / degraded 717 / regenerated 890 / undisturbed 1,061 Mg C/ha.
Seagrass Carbon Emission Factor Dataset published on data.go.id; 2025 national map: 660K ha; integration into NDC pending under MMAF SIDAKO.
Added in SNDC and Blue Carbon Roadmap (Nov 2025) but not yet in MRV.
Covered under MOMAF Reg 1/2025 alongside mangroves and seagrass.
